steps.title: Identify the causal pattern
steps.content: The sentence structure is “a trend that can be [blank] to there being over 500,000 bodies.” The closing phrase “making it nearly impossible to find a unique name” confirms the large quantity CAUSES this trend. We need a word expressing that the trend is caused by or explained by the quantity.

steps.title: Match the causal expression
steps.content: ”Attributed to” directly expresses causation — the trend is caused by or explained by the existence of over 500,000 bodies. The other three choices express different kinds of relationships—being called or mentioned, hinting at something, or entrusting to someone—but none convey causation. That matches choice A — A is correct.
